case_title: TALCOTT, ARTHUR VS LYNCH, MARGARET et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TALCOTT, ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET LYNCH, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, FILED. FEES EXEMPT. COPIES SENT TO DEFTS.
AS PER ORDER ON MOREC ENTERED ON 11/18/02, AMOUNT OF COSTS IN JUDGMENT IS CHANGED FROM $20 TO $80.
NOTE:INTEREST ENTERED $105.79 INCLUDES INTEREST FILED PREVIOUSLY.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TALCOTT, ARTHUR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET LYNCH, JOSEPH $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $71.17 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET LYNCH, JOSEPH
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,212.34 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $105.79 ACCRUED INTEREST, $67.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, JOSEPH
AS PER ORDER OF COMMISSIONER, PLTF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT IS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2500 + COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $80.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,212.34 AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, MARGARET LYNCH, JOSEPH
